Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ob.src.impl

Class AIDWebServiceObservationSourcePluginBase

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ObservationSourcePluginBase
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ob.src.impl.AIDWebServiceObservationSourcePluginBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlugin
Direct Known Subclasses:
AIDWebServiceCSV2ObservationSourcePlugin, AIDWebServiceCSVObservationSourcePlugin, AIDWebServiceXMLAttributeObservationSourcePlugin
public abstract class AIDWebServiceObservationSourcePluginBase extends ObservationSourcePluginBase

    • AIDWebServiceObservationSourcePluginBase

  • Method Details

    • createAIDUrlForAUID

      public String createAIDUrlForAUID(String auid, double minJD, double maxJD)
      Given an AUID, min and max JD, return a web service URL.
      Parameters:
      auid - The AUID of the target.
      minJD - The minimum JD of the range to be loaded.
      maxJD - The maximum JD of the range to be loaded.
      Returns:
      The URL string necessary to load data for the target and JD range.

    • createAIDUrlForAUID

      public String createAIDUrlForAUID(String auid, double minJD, double maxJD, String series, String obsCodes, boolean minFields)
      Given an AUID, min and max JD, and a series, return a web service URL.
      Parameters:
      auid - The AUID of the target.
      minJD - The minimum JD of the range to be loaded.
      maxJD - The maximum JD of the range to be loaded.
      series - The series to be loaded; may be a comma-delimited list or null
      obsCodes - The observer codes to be loaded; may be a comma-delimited list or null
      minFields - Whether or not to request a minimum number of fields.
      Returns:
      The URL string necessary to load data for the target and JD range.

    • createAIDUrlForAUID

      public String createAIDUrlForAUID(String auid, String series, String obsCodes, boolean minFields)
      Given an AUID and a series, return a web service URL to load data for all times with the specified constraints.
      Parameters:
      auid - The AUID of the target.
      series - The series to be loaded; may be a comma-delimited list or null
      obsCodes - The observer codes to be loaded; may be a comma-delimited list or null
      minFields - Whether or not to request a minimum number of fields.
      Returns:
      The URL string necessary to load data for the target and JD range.

    • createAIDUrlForAUID

      public String createAIDUrlForAUID(String auid)
      Given an AUID return a web service URL for all data for the target.
      Parameters:
      auid - The AUID of the target.
      Returns:
      The URL string necessary to load data for the target and JD range.

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Get the human-readable display name for this plugin, e.g. for a period analysis menu item.

    • getDocName

      public String getDocName()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Get a document file name for this plugin. Can be a full (absolute) URL or a file name that assumes the plugin doc directory as a base URL.
      Specified by:
      getDocName in interface IPlugin
      Overrides:
      getDocName in class ObservationSourcePluginBase
      See Also:
      • IPlugin.getDocName()

    • getInputType

      public InputType getInputType()
      Description copied from class: ObservationSourcePluginBase
      What is the input type for this plug-in?
      Specified by:
      getInputType in class ObservationSourcePluginBase
      Returns:
      The input type.

    • getURLs

      public List<URL> getURLs() throws Exception
      Description copied from class: ObservationSourcePluginBase

      Return a list of URL objects; defaults to null.

      NewStarFromObsSourcePlugin invokes this when the input type is URL. If null is returned, a dialog is opened requesting a single URL be entered. The purpose of this is so that when executed from a WebStart context, a plugin cannot create input streams. It can however create URL objects, so if it wants to construct URLs on the fly, this will be OK from a security policy perspective.
      Overrides:
      getURLs in class ObservationSourcePluginBase
      Returns:
      a list of URLs or null.
      Throws:
      Exception - if a problem occurs during URL creation.

    • getNewStarType

      public NewStarType getNewStarType()
      Description copied from class: ObservationSourcePluginBase
      This method returns the NewStarType enumerated value. Most observation sources will use the default implementation, a few may override it.
      Overrides:
      getNewStarType in class ObservationSourcePluginBase
      Returns:
      The NewStarType enumerated value

      public String getInputName()
      Overrides:

      Returns:
      the name associated with the input (e.g. file, URL)

    • setInfo

      public void setInfo(StarInfo info)
      Set the star information object. This is primarily so we can test requestObservations() independent of the rest of the plug-in code.
      Parameters:
      info - the info to set

    • setUrl

      public void setUrl(String urlStr)
      Set the URL. This is primarily so we can test requestObservations() independent of the rest of the plug-in code.
      Parameters:
      url -

      Returns:
      A representative URL.
